---
title: "data set 1 cleaning"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-26"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)

install.packages("tidyverse")
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
rodents <- read_excel("Small_Mammals_75-01.xlsx", col_types = c("numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "text", "numeric", "numeric", "text", "text", "text", "text", "text", "text", "numeric", "text", "text", "text", "text"))
```

```{r}
arrangerodents <- rodents %>% 
  arrange(Location, Genus, Species_Captured, Trapping_Month, Trapping_Day, Plot)
```

```{r}

```
